title: Oil's rally takes a pause as Hormuz stalemate persists
section_path: Oil's rally takes a pause as Hormuz stalemate persists
section_path_text: Oil's rally takes a pause as Hormuz stalemate persists
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Energy markets were unchanged. Industrial metals were steady despite positive economic data in China. Precious metals gained amid a softer USD.

children.title: Main
children.summary:
By Daniel Hynes
Energy markets were unchanged. Industrial metals were steady despite positive economic data in China.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: The rally in crude oil prices paused as the market contemplated a protracted conflict in the Middle East. Dated Brent, the benchmark for the spot physical market eased back below USD123/bbl, while front-month futures fell to USD114/bbl ahead of the expiry of the June contract.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: China banned its refined oil product exports to secure domestic supply last month. Refinery margins have deteriorated following the export ban, leading to a buildup of domestic inventories for oil products.
